title: APOLLO Cork Trivet 5 Fishes
description: Transform Your Kitchen with Our Cork Trivet Enhance your kitchen aesthetic with our Cork Trivet featuring a delightful trio of fishes. Crafted from naturally harvested cork, this set not only adds a touch of charm but also contributes to environmental sustainability. Sourced from the cork oak forests in Portugal, these trivets not only protect your surfaces but also help offset ten million tonnes of carbon annually. Key Features Eco-Friendly Material: Made from cork harvested without harming the tree. Environmental Impact: Cork oak forests in Portugal offset ten million tonnes of carbon annually. Unique Patterns: Each set is one-of-a-kind, blending different patterns for a distinctive touch. Product Specs Material: Natural cork Design: Five fishes Dimensions: 27x23cm Origin: Sourced from cork oak forests in Portugal Environmental Contribution: Continues to absorb CO2 as a byproduct Enticing Finish: Transform your kitchen into a haven of both style and sustainability with our Cork Trivet featuring three charming fishes. Crafted from cork harvested without harming trees, this set not only safeguards your surfaces but also makes a positive impact on the environment. The unique blend of patterns ensures that each trivet is a one-of-a-kind piece. Choose a product that not only adds character to your space but also contributes to a greener planet. With the cork oak forests in Portugal offsetting millions of tonnes of carbon yearly, you're not just purchasing a trivet; you're making a statement for a more sustainable future. Elevate your kitchen decor with this eco-friendly and visually appealing Cork Trivet. Order now and experience the perfect blend of style, uniqueness, and environmental consciousness in your culinary space.
